trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all four confirmation signals — MACD crossover, RSI 63.3 in healthy bullish zone, rising histogram, and price 3.6% above SMA-20 — plus strong AI/cloud infrastructure tailwinds; $677 cash deploys cleanly into ~4 shares.

decisions.briefing: Moderate risk-on day (NASDAQ +0.8%, S&P +0.6%) — solid but not the strong +2% signal that warrants full deployment. With $677 cash above the $500 threshold and 4 open slots, strategy memory calls for at least one buy. ORCL clears all four technical gates and offers enterprise AI exposure without chasing an overbought RSI, so one high-conviction entry is the right move; remaining small cash reserve sits ready for a stronger signal tomorrow.

market_education.summary_en: Equities drifted higher in a low-drama session as cooling inflation expectations kept rate-cut hopes alive heading into the next Fed meeting. Technology names led, buoyed by continued capital commitments to AI data-center buildouts from major cloud providers. Breadth was positive but unspectacular, suggesting broad participation without the kind of institutional urgency that accompanies a true breakout day.
market_education.summary_zh: 股市在平靜氣氛中小幅走高，因通脹預期持續降溫，市場對聯準會降息的期待升溫。科技股領漲，主要受惠於大型雲端業者持續加碼AI資料中心投資的題材支撐。盤面雖呈現正面廣度，但缺乏機構資金積極進場的力道，整體走勢溫和上揚，不具明顯突破格局。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Relying on a single indicator — like RSI alone — can produce false signals. Multi-signal confirmation means requiring several independent technical indicators (e.g. MACD crossover + RSI in the bullish zone + rising histogram + price above SMA-20) to agree before entering a trade. When all four align, it suggests momentum is real and backed by market participation, not just noise.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 單獨依賴一項技術指標（例如只看RSI）容易產生假訊號。「多重訊號確認」是指要求數個獨立的技術指標同時發出一致的買進訊號，例如MACD金叉、RSI處於多頭動能區間、柱狀體上升，以及股價站穩20日均線之上，四項條件全部成立，代表趨勢由真實的市場力道驅動，而非短暫雜訊，此時進場的成功率相對較高。
